# smart_suggestions_codespark

> On-device "related items" for Flutter. Dependency: ai_core_codespark for embeddings (~23 MB model, cached on first run).

## What it does

Given an anchor item (or multiple), finds the most similar items in a collection — fully offline, no API keys. Use cases: "related articles", "you might also like", "similar questions".

## Three-line quick start

```dart
final suggestions = SmartSuggestions();
await suggestions.initialize();
final hits = await suggestions.suggest(anchor: 'running shoes', candidates: items);
```

## Core API

- `SmartSuggestions` — orchestrator. `suggest()`, `suggestFor<T>()`, `suggestLike()`, `createIndex()`, `loadIndex()`.
- `SuggestionIndex<T>` — pre-embedded corpus. `similarTo(index)`, `suggestFor(text)`, `suggestLike(anchors)`, `suggestDiverse(text)`, `add()`, `save()/restore()`.
- `SuggestionResult<T>` — result with `.item`, `.score`, `.index`.
- `SuggestionsList<T>` — widget showing suggestions for an anchor.

## Key differences from semantic_search_codespark

- Anchor-based (not query-based): find items *similar to another item*
- `similarTo(int)`: within-index recommendations without embedding
- Multi-anchor blending: average user history to suggest
- Widget displays computed suggestions (no text field)
